steps.t: Têrkar's Travellers may be in the western market of Zajâna.
Ulishár is at the western market in Zajâna.
The playwright Satagêra is at the western market in Zajâna.
Têrkar's Travellers are at the western market in Zajâna.
Ulishár is at the western market in Zajâna.
The playwright Satagêra is at the western market in Zajâna.
Asharmûl and Zimêlkha went to the residential district of south-east Zajâna.
Zimêlkha is outside the Ordâkh-controlled district in south-east Zajâna.
Asharmûl is outside the Ordâkh-controlled district in south-east Zajâna.
Asharmûl and Zimêlkha asked you to retrieve from the Ordâkhai the coin-purse containing the money Têrkar's Travellers earned from their performance.
The coin-purse you were sent to retrieve has been emptied of its contents by the Ordâkhai, but you should return it to Asharmûl in south-east Zajâna.
Atâlsi is at the western market in Zajâna.
Glorfindel is at the western market in Zajâna.
